queries.question: Show spoken languages of country with the smallest population.
queries.sql: SELECT Name, Spoken_Language FROM Countries ORDER BY Population ASC LIMIT 1
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?spoken_language WHERE {
  ?countries a :Countries .
  ?countries p:name ?name .
  ?countries p:Spoken_Language ?spoken_language .
  ?countries p:Population ?population_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?population_o)
LIMIT 1

queries.question: Show official and spoken languages of country with the smallest population.
queries.sql: SELECT Name, Official_Language, Spoken_Language FROM Countries ORDER BY Population ASC LIMIT 1
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?official_language ?spoken_language WHERE {
  ?countries a :Countries .
  ?countries p:name ?name .
  ?countries p:Official_Language ?official_language .
  ?countries p:Spoken_Language ?spoken_language .
  ?countries p:Population ?population_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?population_o)
LIMIT 1

queries.question: Show the official languages of all countries with a population less than 100 million and these countries.
queries.sql: SELECT Name, Official_Language FROM Countries WHERE Population < '100000000'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?official_language WHERE {
  ?countries a :Countries .
  ?countries p:name ?name .
  ?countries p:Official_Language ?official_language .
  ?countries p:Population ?population_f .
  FILTER(?population_f < 100000000)
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show the country with the smallest population and its language.
Show all countries that have a population less than 100000000 and their languages.
